name: Splunk
description: This app integrates with Splunk to update data on the device, in addition to investigate and ingestion actions

splunk_owner.description: The owner context of the namespace

splunk_app.description: The app context of the namespace

on_poll_command.description: Command for query to use with On Poll

on_poll_query.description: Query to use with On Poll

on_poll_display.description: Fields to save with On Poll

max_container.description: Max events to ingest for Scheduled Polling (Default: 100)

container_update_state.description: Container count to update the state file

container_name_prefix.description: Name to give containers created via ingestion

container_name_values.description: Values to append to container name

remove_empty_cef.description: Remove CEF fields having empty values from the artifact

sleeptime_in_requests.description: The time to wait for next REST call (max 120 seconds)

include_cim_fields.description: Option to keep original Splunk CIM together with SOAR CEF fields

splunk_job_timeout.description: The duration in seconds to wait before a scheduled Splunk job times out

use_event_id_sdi.description: Option to use the event_id field value as the source data identifier instead of the full event hash

actions.description: Run a search query on the Splunk device. Please escape any quotes that are part of the query string

query.name: query
query.description: Query to run (in Splunk Processing Language)

actions.description: Get events pertaining to a host that have occurred in the last 'N' days

ip_hostname.name: ip_hostname
ip_hostname.description: Hostname/IP to search the events of

actions.verbose: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality

start_time.name: start_time
start_time.description: Start of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

end_time.name: end_time
end_time.description: End of time range, in epoch time (milliseconds).

container_count.name: container_count
container_count.description: Maximum number of container records to query for.

artifact_count.name: artifact_count
artifact_count.description: Maximum number of artifact records to query for.

container_id.name: container_id
container_id.description: Comma-separated list of container IDs to limit the ingestion to.
